parameters.content:
## Discovery Session Scheduler

**Setup:**
1. Create YOUR_SMTP_CREDENTIAL
2. Set SCHEDULER_EMAIL_TO and SCHEDULER_RESEARCHER_EMAIL
3. Feed a list of participants with timezones and availability
4. Code nodes compute scheduling recommendations — no LLM required
5. Approval gate before session invitations are sent to participants

parameters.subject: =Session Schedule Confirmed: {{ $('Load Sample Session Data').first().json.study.study_name }}
parameters.message:
=

Schedule approved. Send calendar invites / Calendly links to each participant per the confirmed schedule.

{{ $('Format Schedule Report').first().json.report_text }}
